positive: A vibrant, futuristic cityscape viewed from a high balcony overlooking neon-lit canals, traditional Japanese architecture mixed with cyberpunk elements, rain-slicked streets reflecting vibrant colors, cinematic lighting, highly detailed watercolor and ink wash style, dramatic perspective, sense of scale, --ar 4:5
